description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: High Speed Rail (Hong Kong Section) runs additional temporary train trips
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 高速鐵路(香港段)加開臨時列車車次

2026-03-10T19:25:00.CONTENT_EN: As informed by the Chinese Mainland Railway Authorities, High Speed Rail (Hong Kong Section) will add the following temporary train trips: • To Shenzhenbei: o 15 Mar: G9542 • From Guangzhounan: o 13, 14 Mar: G9541 Purchase your tickets up to 15 days ahead of travel: • 12306 official website (12306. cn) or mobile app • Appointed travel agents • Hong Kong West Kowloon Station o Self-service Ticket Machines: bring valid and original travel documents of all passengers; only e-payment methods are accepted (for example, contactless credit cards, WeChat Pay or Alipay) o Ticketing Counters: may require a longer waiting time Train schedules: • 12306 official website (12306. cn) or mobile app • High Speed Rail website or mobile app
2026-03-10T19:25:00.CONTENT_CN: 中國內地鐵路部門通知，高速鐵路（香港段）將加開以下臨時列車車次： •前往深圳北： o 3月15日：G9542 •由廣州南出發： o 3月13，14日：G9541 如需購買15天內的車票： •12306官方網站（12306.cn）或手機應用程式 •指定代理 •前往香港西九龍站 o 使用自助售票機：需帶備所有乘車人士的有效旅遊證件正本；只接受電子支付（如感應式信用卡、微信支付或支付寶） o 使用票務櫃位：可能需要輪候較長時間 列車服務詳情： •12306官方網站（12306.cn）或手機應用程式 •高速鐵路網頁及手機應用程式

2026-03-11T18:25:00.CONTENT_EN:
Due to traffic accident happened earlier , the following road sections are busy:
– Tuen Mun Road (Yuen Long bound)
– Wong Chu Road (Tuen Mun Road bound)
Motorists passing through the above road sections are advised to drive with utmost care and patience.
2026-03-11T18:25:00.CONTENT_CN:
因較早前交通意外，以下路段的交通繁忙:
–屯門公路(往元朗方向)
–皇珠路(往屯門公路方向)
駕駛人士行經上述路段敬請忍讓及小心駕駛。

2026-03-11T20:04:00.CONTENT_EN:
Traffic at the following road sections have resumed normal:
– Tuen Mun Road (Yuen Long bound)
– Wong Chu Road (Tuen Mun Road bound).
2026-03-11T20:04:00.CONTENT_CN:
以下路段的交通現已恢復正常:
–屯門公路(往元朗方向)
–皇珠路(往屯門公路方向)。
